description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single test stage that runs four jobs, each using a different Python Alpine Docker image. Add a test_py27 job in the test stage that uses the python:2.7-alpine image and executes `pip install pytest .` followed by `pytest`. Add a test_py34 job in the test stage that uses the python:3.4-alpine image and runs the same two commands. Similarly, add test_py35 and test_py36 jobs using python:3.5-alpine and python:3.6-alpine images respectively, each running `pip install pytest .` and `pytest`.
